gt_sql: SELECT T2.date, T2.time FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T2.year = 2010 AND T2.name = 'Abu Dhabi Grand Prix'
pred_sql: SELECT r.date, r.time FROM races r JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId WHERE r.year = 2010 AND c.name = 'Yas Marina Circuit';
question: What time did the the 2010's Formula_1 race took place on the Abu Dhabi Circuit?
